$schema.description: Path to this JSON schema, enabling editor autocomplete.

ammoDamage.description: Damage-vs-armor matrix shared by all weapons. Each cell is the ammo type's percent effectiveness against that armor class (100 = full weapon damage; e.g. bullet 11 vs heavy = 11%).

bullet.description: Percent effectiveness of bullet ammo against each armor class.

heavy.description: Percent of weapon damage dealt to a heavy-armor target (100 = full).

light.description: Percent of weapon damage dealt to a light-armor target (100 = full).

none.description: Percent of weapon damage dealt to an unarmored (none) target (100 = full).

gas.description: Percent effectiveness of gas ammo against each armor class.

heavy.description: Percent of weapon damage dealt to a heavy-armor target (100 = full).

light.description: Percent of weapon damage dealt to a light-armor target (100 = full).

none.description: Percent of weapon damage dealt to an unarmored (none) target (100 = full).

shell.description: Percent effectiveness of shell ammo against each armor class.

heavy.description: Percent of weapon damage dealt to a heavy-armor target (100 = full).

light.description: Percent of weapon damage dealt to a light-armor target (100 = full).

none.description: Percent of weapon damage dealt to an unarmored (none) target (100 = full).

weapons.description: All weapon stat records, in table order (position defines the weapon's index).

index.description: The weapon's class number (0-based); scripts select weapons by this index. Read-only: it must equal the array position (the build validates this).

name.description: Developer label (cosmetic; the engine selects by index, not name).

damage.description: Base damage; final hit damage = round(damage x ammoDamage[ammoType][target armor] / 100).

ammoType.description: Selects which ammoDamage row applies to this weapon.

ammoSpeed.description: Projectile muzzle speed (world units per physics tick), applied along the aim direction.

weaponLength.description: Muzzle forward-offset: distance ahead of the shooter where the projectile/muzzle-flash spawns (barrel length), not range.

sound.description: Fire sound, a game-relative WAV path (e.g. "Sounds\FX\WGunFi.WAV").
